case_title: ROBERT GLENWOOD KOERNER VS. DING BONG LEE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAR-02-1500, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, DING BONG
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY KOERNER, ROBERT GLENWOOD AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, DING BONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-20-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-20-2015 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO JUN-18-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. THE PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. THE DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE UNTIMELY SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL, CLERK KEVIN LEE, NOT REPORTED, D506
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, DING BONG HEARING SET FOR NOV-19-2015 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO DING BONG LEE
SMALL CLAIMS OEX CALENDAR OF NOV-19-2015 IS OFF CALENDAR - NO PROOF OF SERVICE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KOERNER, ROBERT GLENWOOD RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, DING BONG $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,050.00, IN LIEU OF PAYMENT AND AT THE ELECTION OF DEFENDANT, DEFENDANT MAY, NOT LATER THAN JULY 24, 2015, DELIVER TO PLAINTIFF A COPY OF THE LEASE AGREEMENT BETWEEN THE PARTIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE FOR:SMALL CLAIMS SUBPOENA FOR PERSONAL APPEARANCE & PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS AND THINGS AT TRIAL OR HEARING AND DECLARATION. (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS:THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE NOT ABLE TO GAIN ENTRY. FILED BY PLAINTIFF KOERNER, ROBERT GLENWOOD AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, DING BONG
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.
